issue.message: For locale "cs" (Czech) the following quantity should also be defined: `many` (e.g. "10.0 dne")
For locale "lt" (Lithuanian) the following quantity should also be defined: `many` (e.g. "1.1 obuolio")
For locale "cs" (Czech) the following quantity should also be defined: `many` (e.g. "10.0 dne")
For locale "lt" (Lithuanian) the following quantity should also be defined: `many` (e.g. "1.1 obuolio")
For locale "cs" (Czech) the following quantity should also be defined: `many` (e.g. "10.0 dne")
For locale "lt" (Lithuanian) the following quantity should also be defined: `many` (e.g. "1.1 obuolio")

For locale "cs" (Czech) the following quantity should also be defined: `many` (e.g. "10.0 dne")
For locale "lt" (Lithuanian) the following quantity should also be defined: `many` (e.g. "1.1 obuolio")
For locale "cs" (Czech) the following quantity should also be defined: `many` (e.g. "10.0 dne")
For locale "lt" (Lithuanian) the following quantity should also be defined: `many` (e.g. "1.1 obuolio")
The resource string "percent_string_pattern" has been marked as translatable="false" elsewhere (usually in the `values` folder), but is translated to "pl" (Polish) here

Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `?android:colorBackground` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.Kotatsu`)

issue.errorLine1: <string name="onboard_text">Select languages which you want to read manga. You can change it later in settings.</string>

issue.errorLine1: <string name="show_reading_indicators_summary">Show percentage read in history and favorites</string>

issue.message: The resource `R.string.exclude_nsfw_from_history_summary` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="exclude_nsfw_from_history_summary">Manga marked as NSFW will never be added to the history and your progress will not be saved</string>

issue.message: The resource `R.string.manga_error_description_pattern` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="manga_error_description_pattern">Error details:<br><tt>%1$s</tt><br><br>1. Try to <a href="%2$s">open manga in a web browser</a> to ensure it is available on its source<br>2. Make sure you are using the <a href="kotatsu://about">latest version of Kotatsu</a><br>3. If it is available, send an error report to the developers.</string>

issue.message: The resource `R.string.reader_slider` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.network_unavailable_hint` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="network_unavailable_hint">Turn on Wi-Fi or mobile network to read manga online</string>

issue.message: The resource `R.string.share_logs` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.enable_logging` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.enable_logging_summary` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="enable_logging_summary">Record some actions for debug purposes. Don\'t turn it on if you\'re not sure what you\'re doing</string>

issue.message: The resource `R.string.downloads_wifi_only_summary` appears to be unused
